top_signals.title: Stocks Fall With US Futures as AI-Led Rally Stalls: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Asian stocks declined along with US equity-index futures as enthusiasm for the artificial intelligence trade cooled after driving markets to record highs this year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
